title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Events list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Zustand holds events, theme, mega-menu, and Events Manager filters — shared across components
Implemented with React + Zustand + Tailwind CSS; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist events or theme
Manages the events collection only in component-local useState rather than Zustand
Black-void modular composition with dual corner notches and brand-first hero remains intact
Empty Events Manager state is visually present when no events remain
Replaces the marketing site with a plain dashboard and drops signature void/notch language
Required hover animations are present; load entrance, Why Ridge pile, Get started rise, and Global Events decode contracts remain
Marketing/Events mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover feedback on CTAs or event rows so interactive chrome feels static on pointer hover
